item.title: Thunderstorm Supercell
item.description: "Inside the supercell, some of the low-level winds converge and curve, circulating and creating a rotating updraft of the supercell thunderstorm. Called the mesocyclone, this rotating updraft forms within the storm." Source: https://www.foxweather.com/learn/what-is-a-supercell-thunderstorm
item.dc:creator: Fulustreka

item.title: Getting caught using AI in class
item.description: One of my students recently told me with complete confidence that AI is to her generation what calculators were to mine. Once a source of outrage, eventually accepted as normal. What do you think?

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
gives you 15 intelligence and also partial invisibility
we've all been there
ok
yes it does
cocaine?
yes please
accurate
actually was pretty normal then, i'm weird now
tired of them asking that
i'm a guy and i want to be many of these
as is tradition
mmm hmm
i noticed
classic Frank
finally
and with that..
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Regular-sized meme dump
item.description:
I've had this one for almost 6 years but it's like no time has passed at all lol
Bring out the purse Dewey
Because what else could it possibly mean?? I'm desperate to know
Their lives depend on you and they know it
Somebody check on Timmy he's not having a good time
I will marry anyone who can get me their Caramelts
Objection; asked
and answered
This baby grew up to pester Shrek to "do the roar"
I love a resourceful man

item.title: My Gladio Cosplay!
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here! Wanted to drop my cosplay of Gladio from Final Fantasy XV. He’s one of my favorite characters of all time so I had to bring him back.
I built the sword like, 7 years ago and never revisited the look. But after replaying the game recently I decided to debut an updated version— my friends at OperationShutter took these pics and I edited the backgrounds!
This is the shirt— I’ve had the text patches forever but I applied them with contact cement, hammered in studs by hand, and then I drew all of the feathers and the eagle free-hand on pleather and glued them on as well! I also made the strap on the bottom out of an old belt I painted black and added some buttons.
The character for reference. He’s kinda the epitome of toxic masculinity but I love him.
Bonus: me cosplaying the same character back in 2017. I’ve come a long way!
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

F E E T
Love how even the Father of Capitalism thought Landlords were cunts.
Do not.
WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG WAG
Long cloak and big hat is peak character design
a
mood
This is literally the thought processes of people who drive onto level crossings when the barriers are down or the people who walk on train tracks
Love how they chose a picture of an actual gay couple for this (iirc they're engaged).
it's always the terrible fucking manwhores.
oh no
this is basically what life is like.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1247 (have rock)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Good news, mom is FINALLY home from the hospital after almost two weeks. Dad's brush with covid has also now ended, so it's now just a matter of waiting for the next crisis.
I'd pull this stuff, but with birds or dinosaurs.
But we need him so badly. Luigi, save us. Kill another person who's greed has consigned them to hellfire.
A joke about some takes on the historical Jesus
Not a meme: a geologic diagram of the Grand Canyon. Almost two billion years of time on display.
Me, throwing rocks at couples. And at happy people. And at racists.
I could use a scimitar.
I did a stupid, brave, stupid thing. I gvane the bank teller my number on a Meteor Crater Postcard saying, verbatim, "in case you want an extra sidequest, and you want to hang outside work at some point, here you go." I'm an idiot and now I'll need to get a different bank, probably. But at least I've burned the bridge of the one person irl I have a crush on, so now I have no local prospects and can move on with my life with less yearning for companionship because that stuff gets me nowhere.
It would be nice if someone I liked liked me back, and their life was not in such shambles that my presence would be poisonous. Eh. Oh well. It's pretty clear that I'll have to choose between a job I like and that I'm good at that also allows me sufficient free time, and moving to a new, far-away place with a larger population of potentially date-able people and working a job I'm less good at that causes me more stress if the relationship thing is going to change. Convincing someone to move here has never worked.
Not to mention, society is going to collapse like the late brone-age soon enough and that I'll end up a climate change refugee in 10 years anyway, so it doesn't matter. Maybe it'll be a situation in the last book I finished, where the two people finally met their true loves in the post-apocalyptic world in their ancient ages. Or ill get eaten by cazadores, whatever.
Sorry. Feeling very doomed today. I'll suck it up.
SO HOW IS EVERYONE ELSE DOING WITH THE IMPENDING COLLAPSE?
I'm also in a Mood because one of my coworkers was ranting about how much he hates Canadians and that he thinks we should just roll over Canada with tanks and invade them and take them over a d how he hopes The Orange Man does so. When I suggested it might not be the best idea because really, his prior rant about how Canadians were stupid means that upon taking them over meant there would be more stupid Americans, he indicated that would avtially be fine, great even because, and here I quote verbatim "despite our stupidity, we Americans are the greatest nation in the world." I wanted to throw up on him, or stab him. I didn't have any of my knives, though.
He's the guy I know would turn me in for a buck or two if that sort of thing came to pass.
Whatever. Yeah. I'm in A Mood today. A Moody Mood that Moods.
Goddamn I need someone to give me a long hug. I do not feel particularly loveable right now. Ugh.
That's a cute python.
This probably would fly really well in Sedona.
I would totally watch rats playing Doom.
Accurate.
All the fucking time.
Hahahha
Or just visit current reality, it's just as sad, even more so.
Yeah, my plan is just to run into the mushroom cloud.
Orion over dunes.
New cpap mask is helping greatly. Though I slept through my alarms today, Pippin woke me up. Luckily, I don't have an 8am tour so I won't be late...
I do love my corvids.
A reference to the successor to Walking with Dinosaurs, where an Ambulocetus appears in Eocene Germany for some goddamn reason.
Pippin tax! Pippin's message of the day: "Peek-a-boo! Beep. Beep-beep."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Checking the curd to see if it's ready to cut
item.description: If you curd vaginafies it's ready
